title: Acianthera amaralii
taxonomy: Acianthera amaralii is a species of orchid in the genus Acianthera. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Acianthera is a group of orchids that are native to the Americas, and Acianthera amaralii is one of the many species within this group. Acianthera amaralii is typically classified as a terrestrial orchid, growing in the wild in a variety of habitats. The classification of Acianthera amaralii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchids and its unique characteristics.
